description: Non-WIRE02 conformance requirements. Generated by build-extension-registry.mjs. Composed into requirement-ids.json by the main build pipeline.

requirements.summary: V2 offers must include maxTimeoutSeconds as a positive number
requirements.source_fragment: maxTimeoutSeconds: must be a positive number (duration, not epoch)

requirements.summary: V2 verification rejects offers when supportedVersions excludes 2
requirements.source_fragment: V2 offers require supportedVersions to include 2

requirements.summary: Unknown V2 shapes rejected in strict mode
requirements.source_fragment: Unknown V2 shapes are rejected in strict mode (fail-closed)

requirements.summary: Default supportedVersions does not include 2
requirements.source_fragment: Default: [1] (V2 rejected unless explicitly enabled)

requirements.summary: did:key resolves z (base58btc) multibase prefix
requirements.source_fragment: Supports both multibase forms: z (base58btc) and u (base64url)

requirements.summary: did:key resolves u (base64url) multibase prefix
requirements.source_fragment: u prefix: base64url encoding (multibase)

requirements.summary: did:key rejects non-Ed25519 keys without timing oracle
requirements.source_fragment: Non-Ed25519 keys are rejected without oracle (no early-return, prevents timing side-channels)

requirements.summary: did:web transforms path segments to URL path components
requirements.source_fragment: URL transformation: did:web:example.com:path:to transforms to https://example.com/path/to/did.json

requirements.summary: did:web handles percent-encoded port in DID
requirements.source_fragment: Percent-encoded port: did:web:example.com%3A8443 transforms to https://example.com:8443/.well-known/did.json

requirements.summary: did:web rejects IP literal hostnames
requirements.source_fragment: IP literal rejection: did:web with IP literal hostname is rejected

requirements.summary: Resolved document id matches input DID exactly
requirements.source_fragment: Exact id match: resolved document id must match the input DID

requirements.summary: gRPC carrier computes real SHA-256 receipt_ref
requirements.source_fragment: extract(): reads receipt from metadata, computes real SHA-256 receipt_ref via node:crypto

requirements.summary: gRPC carrier rejects binary metadata keys
requirements.source_fragment: Binary metadata (gRPC -bin suffix convention) is rejected for PEAC receipt data

requirements.summary: Default receipt type is interaction-record+jwt
requirements.source_fragment: Default receipt type: interaction-record+jwt (Wire 0.2)

requirements.summary: PKCE verifier is 43-128 chars from unreserved set
requirements.source_fragment: Verifier: 43-128 chars from RFC 7636 unreserved set

requirements.summary: S256 is the only supported challenge method
requirements.source_fragment: S256 only; plain method is rejected

requirements.summary: Auth observation never produces allow or deny decision
requirements.source_fragment: decision: always review (never allow or deny)

requirements.summary: Token material never appears in auth evidence output
requirements.source_fragment: Token material never included in evidence output

requirements.summary: Resolver verifies sha256(jws) equals receipt_ref
requirements.source_fragment: Caller MUST verify: sha256(fetched_jws) == carrier.receipt_ref

requirements.summary: Carrier middleware returns pure PeacEvidenceCarrier
requirements.source_fragment: The returned carrier is always a pure PeacEvidenceCarrier

requirements.summary: Resolver does not cache failed resolutions
requirements.source_fragment: No negative caching: failed resolutions are never cached

requirements.summary: Non-strict mode returns carrier unchanged on failure
requirements.source_fragment: Resolution fails or ref mismatch: strict false (default) returned unchanged

requirements.summary: in-toto mapping uses first subject for source_ref
requirements.source_fragment: subject[0].uri -> source_ref (first subject; multi-subject uses first)

requirements.summary: SLSA mapping sets slsa.version to 1.2
requirements.source_fragment: Maps SLSA v1.2 provenance: slsa track/level/version fields

requirements.summary: in-toto mapping targets v1.0 Statement type only
requirements.source_fragment: Throws Error if statement._type is not in-toto v1.0

requirements.summary: All runtime-governance records use evidence kind
requirements.source_fragment: All categories produce Interaction Records with kind: "evidence"

requirements.summary: Type URIs use org.peacprotocol/runtime-governance- prefix
requirements.source_fragment: org.peacprotocol/runtime-governance-{observation-type}

requirements.summary: Extension namespace is org.peacprotocol/runtime-governance
requirements.source_fragment: All runtime-governance adapters share a single extension namespace

requirements.summary: Provider field is present in extension and never empty
requirements.source_fragment: Provider name. Caller-supplied; never hardcoded

requirements.summary: Upstream integrity artifacts preserved as opaque strings
requirements.source_fragment: Adapters SHOULD preserve raw upstream artifacts as opaque blobs

requirements.summary: PEAC must not derive, recompute, rank, or authoritatively assess trust
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC never computes, validates, or weights trust scores

requirements.summary: Compliance observations are observational, never authoritative determinations
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC never makes compliance determinations

requirements.summary: Records carry exactly one of the 10 A2A handoff type URIs in the extension payload
requirements.source_fragment: A record carries exactly one type URI

requirements.summary: Extension payload type field equals the wire-record type URI
requirements.source_fragment: The payload's type field MUST equal the type URI declared at the wire-record level

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields use the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix)
requirements.source_fragment: All *_ref fields in this profile use the shared opaque-reference grammar

requirements.summary: Agent Card observation uses signature_observation.caller_reported_verification (not legacy signature.verified)
requirements.source_fragment: The legacy shape signature: { verified: true, ... } was REJECTED in v0.14.1

requirements.summary: Helper file does not import signature-verification APIs (artifact-shape import-graph test enforces)
requirements.source_fragment: The Agent Card observation helper MUST NOT verify Agent Card signatures

requirements.summary: Extension payload top-level keys do not include decision/verdict/score/result/etc.
requirements.source_fragment: An emitted record's extension payload MUST NOT contain any of: decision, verdict, score, result, passed, failed, policy_result, approval_result, outcome, judgment, rating, grade, pass, fail, allow, deny, authorized, denied, granted, rejected_reason as top-level keys

requirements.summary: Agent Card payload's discovery_path is one of the three recognized values
requirements.source_fragment: discovery_path: enum (one of /.well-known/agent-card.json, /.well-known/peac.json, header-probe)

requirements.summary: Task observation event field matches the type URI
requirements.source_fragment: event: enum (one of task.submitted, task.accepted, ...) MUST match type

requirements.summary: observed_at and discovered_at are RFC 3339 timestamps with offset
requirements.source_fragment: RFC 3339 timestamp

requirements.summary: upstream_event_digest, when present, is sha256:<64 hex>
requirements.source_fragment: sha256:<64 hex> digest of the upstream A2A event payload

requirements.summary: CLI execution record has type org.peacprotocol/cli-command-execution and surface.kind = cli
requirements.source_fragment: type: org.peacprotocol/cli-command-execution; surface: { kind: 'cli' }

requirements.summary: command.program is basename-only (no path separators)
requirements.source_fragment: command.program rejects '/' and '\\'; path disclosure lives only under binary.path_*

requirements.summary: command.argv_mode = raw requires capture_policy.raw_capture_unsafely_allowed = true
requirements.source_fragment: argv_mode raw requires --unsafe-allow-raw-capture

requirements.summary: env.entries keys are a subset of capture_policy.env_allowlist
requirements.source_fragment: env_allowlist subset constraint

requirements.summary: stream sample_base64 and sample_suppressed_reason are mutually exclusive; matched_pattern_category is biconditional with sample_suppressed_reason
requirements.source_fragment: sample/suppression mutual exclusion + matched_pattern_category coupling

requirements.summary: shell_mode = true requires binary.shell_ref present, binary.path_mode != 'none'; under hashed mode shell_ref equals binary.path_sha256
requirements.source_fragment: shell_mode <-> shell_ref biconditional + canonical-digest equivalence

requirements.summary: Validator rejects 20 forbidden top-level keys with lifecycle.inline_value_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: lifecycle.inline_value_blocked rejects all 20 forbidden top-level keys at extension top level

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix); numeric strings reject via no-prefix
requirements.source_fragment: all *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar

requirements.summary: approver_ref containing @ rejects with lifecycle.approver_ref_pii_blocked (priority over general grammar code)
requirements.source_fragment: approver_ref @-detection prioritized as a PII-blocked subclass

requirements.summary: Non-string *_ref values reject with lifecycle.ref_must_be_string; no generic Zod string error leaks as a public diagnostic
requirements.source_fragment: non-string *_ref values reject with lifecycle.ref_must_be_string; no Zod-string error leaks as a public diagnostic

requirements.summary: Per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; missing observed_at and other missing required fields surface lifecycle.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; missing observed_at uses lifecycle.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: Unknown event_kind rejects with lifecycle.event_kind_unknown
requirements.source_fragment: unknown event_kind rejects with lifecycle.event_kind_unknown

requirements.summary: Malformed observed_at rejects with lifecycle.invalid_observed_at; missing observed_at is covered by missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: malformed observed_at rejects with lifecycle.invalid_observed_at; missing observed_at is covered by lifecycle.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: Lifecycle records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()
requirements.source_fragment: lifecycle records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()

requirements.summary: Every type URI in LIFECYCLE_OBSERVATION_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/lifecycle-observation in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP
requirements.source_fragment: every URI in LIFECYCLE_OBSERVATION_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/lifecycle-observation in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP

requirements.summary: Spec orchestrator-boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not assign work, run agents, schedule tasks, manage issue trackers, route approvals, decide step ordering, or enforce workflow policy
requirements.source_fragment: the orchestrator-boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not assign work, run agents, schedule tasks, manage issue trackers, route approvals, decide step ordering, or enforce workflow policy

requirements.summary: Validator rejects 20 forbidden top-level credential-bearing keys with provisioning.inline_credential_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: provisioning.inline_credential_blocked rejects 20 forbidden top-level credential-bearing keys at extension top level

requirements.summary: Recursive secret-scanner walker rejects forbidden key names at any depth with provisioning.forbidden_key_name and credential-shaped value strings with provisioning.token_material_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: recursive walker inspects key names AND value strings at every depth; forbidden key names reject with provisioning.forbidden_key_name; credential-shaped value strings reject with provisioning.token_material_blocked

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar; all *_digest fields validated by the Sha256DigestSchema grammar
requirements.source_fragment: all *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar; all *_digest fields validated by the Sha256DigestSchema grammar

requirements.summary: storage_surface object uses abstract kind enum (external_secret_store, local_encrypted_file, local_plaintext_file, environment_file, runtime_secret_binding, none, unknown); no vendor-specific values
requirements.source_fragment: storage_surface kind is one of external_secret_store, local_encrypted_file, local_plaintext_file, environment_file, runtime_secret_binding, none, unknown

requirements.summary: scheme_id follows a bounded ASCII grammar (max 128 UTF-8 bytes; allowed characters [a-z0-9._:/+-]); scheme_id and scheme_ref are mutually exclusive
requirements.source_fragment: scheme_id is a bounded ASCII token (max 128 UTF-8 bytes; allowed [a-z0-9._:/+-]); mutually exclusive with scheme_ref

requirements.summary: payment_authorization_observation.max_amount_minor is a non-negative bounded decimal-integer string; negative values reject with provisioning.invalid_amount_minor
requirements.source_fragment: max_amount_minor is non-negative bounded decimal string; negative values reject with provisioning.invalid_amount_minor

requirements.summary: Per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; missing observed_at and other missing required fields surface provisioning.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; missing required fields surface provisioning.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: Unknown event_kind rejects with provisioning.invalid_event_kind; the discriminator is closed over the 10 *-observed event families
requirements.source_fragment: unknown event_kind rejects with provisioning.invalid_event_kind; closed-enum discriminator over 10 -observed event families

requirements.summary: Every type URI in PROVISIONING_LIFECYCLE_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/provisioning-lifecycle in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP
requirements.source_fragment: every URI in PROVISIONING_LIFECYCLE_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/provisioning-lifecycle in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP

requirements.summary: Spec boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not authorize the action, verify legal acceptance, provision resources, validate credentials, process payments, vouch for provider state, settle transactions, manage credential vaults, or operate the runtime
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC does not authorize the action, verify legal acceptance, provision resources, validate credentials, process payments, vouch for provider state, settle transactions, manage credential vaults, or operate the runtime

requirements.summary: Validator rejects 20 forbidden top-level content-bearing keys with agent.action.inline_content_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: agent.action.inline_content_blocked rejects 20 forbidden top-level content-bearing keys at extension top level

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix, byte-bounded)
requirements.source_fragment: all *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix, byte-bounded)

requirements.summary: Non-string *_ref values reject with agent.action.ref_must_be_string; no Zod string error leaks as a public diagnostic
requirements.source_fragment: non-string *_ref values reject with agent.action.ref_must_be_string; no Zod string error leaks as a public diagnostic

requirements.summary: Per-event-kind required fields enforced; missing agent_ref, action_ref, observed_at, and event-kind-specific required fields surface agent.action.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; missing required fields surface agent.action.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: Unknown event_kind rejects with agent.action.event_kind_unknown
requirements.source_fragment: unknown event_kind rejects with agent.action.event_kind_unknown; closed-enum discriminator over 6 *-observed event kinds

requirements.summary: Malformed observed_at rejects with agent.action.invalid_observed_at; missing observed_at is covered by missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: malformed observed_at rejects with agent.action.invalid_observed_at; missing observed_at is covered by agent.action.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: agent-action-delegated-observed requires delegated_to_ref; absent delegated_to_ref rejects with agent.action.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: agent-action-delegated-observed requires delegated_to_ref; absent delegated_to_ref rejects with agent.action.missing_required_field

requirements.summary: Agent action records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()
requirements.source_fragment: agent action records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()

requirements.summary: Every type URI in AGENT_ACTION_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/agent-action in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateAgentActionForType rejects unknown type URIs (type_uri_unknown) and type URI / event_kind mismatches (type_event_kind_mismatch)
requirements.source_fragment: every URI in AGENT_ACTION_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/agent-action in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateAgentActionForType runtime guard: unknown type URI -> agent.action.type_uri_unknown; mismatched event_kind -> agent.action.type_event_kind_mismatch

requirements.summary: Spec boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not approve, deny, authorize, schedule, execute, govern, enforce, monitor, score, or orchestrate actions
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC does not approve, deny, authorize, schedule, execute, govern, enforce, monitor, score, or orchestrate actions; action decisions are reported by the caller

requirements.summary: Validator rejects 20 forbidden top-level payment-data keys with commerce.mandate.inline_payment_data_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: commerce.mandate.inline_payment_data_blocked rejects 20 forbidden top-level payment-data keys (card_number / pan / cvv / cvc / expiry_date / card_holder_name / billing_address / shipping_address / token / raw_token / bearer_token / api_key / secret / private_key / private_key_pem / credential / password / connection_string / iban / bank_account) at extension top level

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix, byte-bounded); violations surface commerce.mandate.opaque_ref_grammar_violation; non-string values surface commerce.mandate.ref_must_be_string
requirements.source_fragment: all *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (mandate_ref / merchant_ref / payer_ref / authorization_ref / capture_ref / void_ref / refund_ref / settlement_ref / budget_ref / caller_ref / policy_ref / upstream_artifact_ref / parent_ref / scheme_ref)

requirements.summary: All amount fields use AmountMinorStringSchema; numeric, decimal, empty, and unsafe forms reject with commerce.mandate.invalid_amount_minor
requirements.source_fragment: AmountMinorStringSchema bounded decimal-integer string for amount_minor and max_amount_minor; numeric, decimal, empty values reject with commerce.mandate.invalid_amount_minor

requirements.summary: Per-event-kind required fields enforced; missing mandate_ref, observed_at, and event-kind-specific required fields surface commerce.mandate.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; mandate_ref and observed_at are common required; per-kind: mandate (merchant_ref, payer_ref); authorization (authorization_ref, amount_minor, currency); capture (authorization_ref, capture_ref, amount_minor, currency); void (authorization_ref, void_ref); refund (refund_ref, amount_minor, currency); settlement (settlement_ref, amount_minor, currency, settlement_state); budget (budget_ref)

requirements.summary: Unknown event_kind rejects with commerce.mandate.invalid_event_kind
requirements.source_fragment: unknown event_kind rejects with commerce.mandate.invalid_event_kind; closed-enum discriminator over 7 *-observed event kinds (mandate / authorization / capture / void / refund / settlement / budget)

requirements.summary: Finality-synthesis boundary: settlement_state on any non-settlement event kind rejects with commerce.mandate.finality_synthesis_blocked
requirements.source_fragment: settlement_state on commerce-authorization-observed (or any non-settlement variant) rejects with commerce.mandate.finality_synthesis_blocked; settlement finality may only be reported via commerce-settlement-observed

requirements.summary: scheme_id (bounded grammar) and scheme_ref (opaque) are mutually exclusive; both present rejects with commerce.mandate.scheme_conflict
requirements.source_fragment: scheme_id and scheme_ref are mutually exclusive; setting both rejects with commerce.mandate.scheme_conflict; scheme_id must match bounded grammar [a-z0-9._:/+-]{1,128} (lowercase preferred; no whitespace, no @)

requirements.summary: Commerce mandate records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()
requirements.source_fragment: commerce mandate records round-trip through @peac/protocol.issue() and verifyLocal()

requirements.summary: Every type URI in COMMERCE_MANDATE_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/commerce-mandate in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateCommerceMandateForType rejects unknown type URIs (type_uri_unknown) and type URI / event_kind mismatches (type_event_kind_mismatch)
requirements.source_fragment: every URI in COMMERCE_MANDATE_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/commerce-mandate in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateCommerceMandateForType runtime guard: unknown type URI -> commerce.mandate.type_uri_unknown; mismatched event_kind -> commerce.mandate.type_event_kind_mismatch

requirements.summary: Spec boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not authorize payments, process payments, settle funds, enforce mandates, compute payment finality, evaluate budgets, validate payment rails, or vouch for the legal validity of any commerce decision
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC does not authorize payments, process payments, settle funds, enforce mandates, compute payment finality, evaluate budgets, validate payment rails, or vouch for the legal validity of any commerce decision; commerce decisions are reported by the caller

requirements.summary: Validator rejects 19 forbidden top-level payment-data keys with gateway.export.inline_payment_data_blocked. value_minor is intentionally NOT in this list (rejected as gateway.export.unknown_field via the strict variant schema; the single canonical money field is amount_minor)
requirements.source_fragment: gateway.export.inline_payment_data_blocked rejects 19 forbidden top-level payment-data keys (transaction_data / raw_tx / tx_hash_value / nonce / raw_nonce / payer / pay_to / payTo / payment_payload / authorization / authorization_payload / card_number / pan / cvv / token / bearer_token / api_key / private_key / credential) at extension top level. value_minor is NOT in this list; it is rejected as gateway.export.unknown_field via the strict variant schema (single canonical money field is amount_minor)

requirements.summary: All *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (no whitespace, no @, recognized prefix, byte-bounded); violations surface gateway.export.opaque_ref_grammar_violation; non-string values surface gateway.export.ref_must_be_string
requirements.source_fragment: all *_ref fields validated by the OpaqueRefSchema grammar (gateway_ref / payment_ref / facilitator_ref / tx_ref / nonce_ref / upstream_artifact_ref / caller_ref / parent_ref / payer_ref / pay_to_ref / settlement_ref / failure_reason_ref / chain_ref)

requirements.summary: amount_minor uses the shared AmountMinorStringSchema grammar plus a Gateway Export non-negative profile constraint; numeric, decimal, comma-formatted, empty, AND negative values reject with gateway.export.invalid_amount_minor; the base amount_minor field is the single canonical money field (EIP-3009 value maps here when four-tuple refs are present); no separate value_minor field is defined (records carrying value_minor reject as gateway.export.unknown_field via the strict variant schema, not as inline_payment_data_blocked)
requirements.source_fragment: amount_minor uses the shared AmountMinorStringSchema grammar (bounded base-10 integer string) wrapped in a Gateway Export non-negative profile constraint (negative values reject); numeric, decimal, comma-formatted, empty, and negative values reject with gateway.export.invalid_amount_minor; single-canonical-money-field invariant: amount_minor is the only monetary field per record; records carrying value_minor reject as gateway.export.unknown_field via the strict variant schema

requirements.summary: Per-event-kind required fields enforced; missing gateway_ref, payment_ref, observed_at, and event-kind-specific required fields surface gateway.export.missing_required_field
requirements.source_fragment: per-event-kind required fields enforced via discriminated union; gateway_ref / payment_ref / observed_at are common required; per-kind: payment-submitted (submitted_at); facilitator-timeout (timeout_at, timeout_profile); settlement-unresolved (last_checked_at, check_count); settlement-polling (poll_count, polling_strategy); settlement-confirmed (confirmed_at, settlement_ref); settlement-confirmed-late (confirmed_at, settlement_ref, delay_ms); settlement-failed (final_state); settlement-failed-orphaned (last_known_state)

requirements.summary: Unknown event_kind rejects with gateway.export.invalid_event_kind
requirements.source_fragment: unknown event_kind rejects with gateway.export.invalid_event_kind; closed-enum discriminator over 8 *-observed event kinds (7 settlement/recovery states + 1 facilitator-timeout trigger observation)

requirements.summary: Trigger-vs-state doctrine: 7 type URIs correspond to observed settlement/recovery states; gateway-facilitator-timeout-observed records the facilitator-timeout trigger event itself, not a settlement state; PEAC does NOT introduce a new settlement state
requirements.source_fragment: 7-state settlement/recovery model plus one PEAC timeout-trigger observation; gateway-facilitator-timeout-observed records the facilitator-timeout trigger event itself, not a settlement state; PEAC does not introduce a new settlement state

requirements.summary: timeout_profile closed enum aligned with upstream environment profiles (datacenter / east_africa_3g / west_africa_3g / custom); caller-reported labels (PEAC does NOT infer geography, network quality, settlement finality, or settlement guarantees); custom REQUIRES facilitator_timeout_ms + poll_interval_ms + max_poll_window_ms (each non-negative safe integer, bounded 0..2_592_000_000); polling_strategy is a PEAC-defined OBSERVER-scope categorical field (not an upstream enum)
requirements.source_fragment: timeout_profile closed enum (datacenter / east_africa_3g / west_africa_3g / custom) aligned with upstream environment profiles; caller-reported labels; PEAC does not infer geography, network quality, settlement finality, or settlement guarantees; custom requires facilitator_timeout_ms, poll_interval_ms, max_poll_window_ms (each non-negative safe integer bounded 0..2_592_000_000); polling_strategy is a PEAC observer categorization, not an upstream enum

requirements.summary: Bounded numeric fields enforced; poll_count and check_count bounded to 0..1_000_000 reject with gateway.export.invalid_poll_count / gateway.export.invalid_check_count; deadline_exceeded_ms / delay_ms / facilitator_timeout_ms / poll_interval_ms / max_poll_window_ms bounded to 0..2_592_000_000 reject with corresponding stable codes; valid_before_unix_seconds is a non-negative safe integer (caller-reported EIP-3009 expiry in Unix seconds)
requirements.source_fragment: poll_count and check_count bounded to 0..1_000_000; deadline_exceeded_ms / delay_ms / facilitator_timeout_ms / poll_interval_ms / max_poll_window_ms bounded to 0..2_592_000_000 (30 days); valid_before_unix_seconds non-negative safe integer; all numeric fields enforce Number.isSafeInteger

requirements.summary: Every type URI in GATEWAY_EXPORT_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/gateway-export in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateGatewayExportForType rejects unknown type URIs (type_uri_unknown) and type URI / event_kind mismatches (type_event_kind_mismatch)
requirements.source_fragment: every URI in GATEWAY_EXPORT_TYPE_URIS maps to org.peacprotocol/gateway-export in TYPE_TO_EXTENSION_MAP; validateGatewayExportForType runtime guard: unknown type URI -> gateway.export.type_uri_unknown; mismatched event_kind -> gateway.export.type_event_kind_mismatch

requirements.summary: Spec boundary text is normative and vendor-neutral; PEAC does not settle transactions, route payments, contact gateways, verify on-chain state, monitor settlements, enforce recovery policy, resolve settlement disputes, or vouch for the legal validity of any settlement decision
requirements.source_fragment: PEAC does not settle transactions, route payments, contact gateways, verify on-chain state, monitor settlements, enforce recovery policy, or resolve settlement disputes; recovery decisions are reported by the caller
